findings.description: Source code example explicitly mentions two framework-provided utility classes — `MapValueEditor` (interface) and `MaskingMapValueEditor` (implementation) — described as 'フレームワークが提供するMap編集用のユーティリティ'. These class names are omitted from the knowledge file. Developers implementing masking customization would benefit from knowing these framework utilities exist.
findings.source_evidence: private MapValueEditor mapValueEditor = new MaskingMapValueEditor(MASKING_CHAR, MASKING_PATTERNS); // フレームワークが提供するMap編集用のユーティリティ。

findings.description: Section content references PascalCase class 'FailureLogContext' (via 'FailureLogContext.getData()') and 'CustomDataFailureLogFormatter' (shown in the Java code example), but neither appears in the section's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Knowledge file section text: 'FailureLogContext.getData() で処理対象データを取得し' and code block 'public class CustomDataFailureLogFormatter extends FailureLogFormatter'
